CMS Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
Medicare Part D Formulary File — OTC Drug File1
Version — October 2025
Long SAS NAME Label Type Length
FORMULARY_ID Formulary Identification Number2 CHAR 8
FRMLRY_RX_ID CCW Formulary Drug Identifier CHAR 8
BN Brand Name CHAR 30
GNN Generic Name CHAR 30
STR Drug Strength Description CHAR 10
GCDF Dosage Form Code CHAR 2
GCDF_DESC Dosage Form Code Description CHAR 40
1 This file was first available starting with the 2011 data release.
2 Prior
